L1.head: lifetime of metastable intermediate conformational states
L1.claim: The lifetime of specific intermediate conformational states critically determines functional signaling bias

L1.head: functional signaling bias
L1.claim: Functional signaling bias provides a mechanism for subtype-selective drug targeting

L1.head: designed ligands stabilizing transient states
L1.claim: Ligands stabilizing transient states enable quantification via molecular dynamics simulations

L1.head: quantification of conformational state lifetimes
L1.claim: Quantified lifetimes validate the role of state longevity in signaling bias
